steps.t: The hunters' camp is a little to the north of Haldirith. You should try to frighten Wynmar, the leader of the hunters' camp.
The hunters' camp is a little to the north of Haldirith. You should try to frighten Wynmar, the leader of the hunters' camp.
The Rohirrim leader of the hunters' camp is in the north-western woods of Thinglad. Since your tactics are not working against this stubborn Rohirrim,…
Noriel is at the Elf-outpost of Haldirith. You should bring news of this twist in the plan to Noriel.
Wynmar is at his camp in Thinglad. You should tell Wynmar to stay put while you and Noriel search for his missing friend.
